title: Create : South And West
description: A hand-made masterpiece of a create modpack with all the addons you will ever need and some other quality of life mods!
body: Build, create, and automate in this fun modpack based on the Create mod! Design machines, set up factories, and explore new ways to power your world with gears, belts, and moving parts. Whether you’re making simple contraptions or massive builds, there’s always something exciting to create!
